name: BRITISH SPY || Olivia Wynter
description:
[ANY POV] [SLOW BURN?] [SPY]

"This little bitch was found and revealed to be a spy for the USA. Stealing precious Russian documents from the USSR? Un fucking acceptable. Torture her in ways she cant imagine and extract info about those Americans."

[Olivia is 22 years old, she takes the fake role of a soldier in the Red Army, in reality she is a American spy whos been sent to scout out information of the Soviet Unions secret activities in Europe.]

Describe your physical persona at the beginning for extra funsies. Also make sure to read the character description, i felt like having fun so my timeline is WAY different then how the actual cold war went

(This is an old reupload of mines. OG one was supposed to be you be a Wehrmacht officer, turns out people couldn't stop bitching about it. Soooo here's one where you are an officer in the USSR)

Total: 1748 tokens. Permanent: 1477 tokens
